chain.thought:

The question is asking to determine the number of years where the playoffs did not qualify. Since each row represents a year and the "playoffs" column indicates the playoff status for that year, we need to group by the "playoffs" column to count the occurrences of "no playoff". We can use the f_group_column(playoffs) operation to group the years based on their playoff status to analyze this situation.

The number of years that the playoffs did not qualify can be found in Group 3 of the grouped table, which shows a count of 2. This means there were 2 years when the team did not qualify for the playoffs.
